name: Adolph Deutsch
abstract: Adolph Sender Charles Deutsch (20 October 1897 – 1 January 1980) was a British-American composer, conductor and arranger. Born in London, England, he immigrated to the United States in 1911, and settled in Buffalo, New York.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: Adolph Deutsch was his main arranger. He finally went to Hollywood and made it big there.
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Oneonta, New York, December 28, 2005
